title: Enums Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the enums family — ProjectType, ProjectStage, ProjectStatus, Decision Closure status, severity, repair tier, object status, module visibility, integration status, and forbidden-value sets. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 2 — Enum and Validation Rule Extraction). Anti-regression tokens (`preconstruction_only`, `warranty_closeout`, `Archived`-as-Stage, `active_construction`-as-Type) appear only inside `forbidden_values` arrays once populated, never as valid enum members. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §3.2, §4B.0, §4B.1, §22, §19, §19A.
